modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble copying a formula to adjacent cells in Excel.

full_description_text: So, I was trying to copy a formula over to the cells next to it in Excel, but it just wasn’t working out. I thought it would be a simple drag or copy-paste, but nothing happened as expected. It’s frustrating when you’re in the middle of a project and these little things slow you down. Anyone else run into this issue?
short_description: Trouble copying a formula to adjacent cells in Excel.
